_comment_ignore: object_id and file.file_id are sequential synthetic IDs assigned during indexing; Go's filesystem-readdir order differs from C++'s scanner ordering so the integers diverge run-to-run. The semantic content (path, line, name, type, exported, refs) all match — mask the IDs and verify everything else.

tiers._rationale_ignore: BASE_IGNORE_NON_DETERMINISM applies implicitly (pid/timestamp/elapsed_ms/version/jsonrpc envelope etc.); this list captures the descriptor-specific drift beyond the universal baseline.
